title: Senior Teacher - NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Join the NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates family as a Senior Teacher in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates:
NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation Asia Pacific Associates!
